text:
POST /checks
GET /runs/:id

Auth, quotas, adapter health, and evidence retention

text: MCP server
textPreview: MCP server

text: For AI agents and analyst workflows
textPreview: For AI agents and analyst workflows

text:
Tools: check_cart_total, search_product, read_run
Resources: run JSON, screenshots, adapter status
Prompts: investigate price delta, summarize evidence
Transports: local stdio first, hosted HTTP later
textPreview: Tools: check_cart_total, search_product, read_run | Resources: run JSON, screenshots, adapter status | Prompts: investigate price delta, ...

text: Same engine, two surfaces: deterministic APIs for software, MCP primitives for models that need tools and context.
